rules.rule_text:
rule CrowdStrike_PutterPanda_06 : xor_dropper putterpanda
{
	meta:
		description = "PUTTER PANDA - XOR based dropper"
		date = "2014-03-30"
		version = "1.0"
		in_the_wild = true
		copyright = "CrowdStrike, Inc."
		actor = "PUTTER PANDA"

	strings:
		$xorloop = { 8b d0 83 e2 0f 8a 54 14 04 30 14 01 83 c0 01 3b c6 7c ed  }

	condition:
		$xorloop
}
